name: Surface and warn
summary: Display a visible badge/overlay on the page alerting the user to a detected issue, without blocking action.

evidence.claim: The Dapde Pattern Highlighter pioneered the 'highlight but don't block' model for dark-pattern interventions.

body.description: Display an inline badge, overlay, or sidebar alert on the page when an issue is detected. Does NOT block the user's action. User remains in control; Lens's role is to inform. Model inspired by Dapde Pattern Highlighter (E1).

prerequisites.description: User must have the Lens extension installed and granted page access.

successSignals.description: Telemetry: user hovered on or clicked the badge.
